title: Leaderboard
dbOfflineHint: ELO rankings are temporarily unavailable. Gameplay is unaffected; data will appear once the database is back.
loadFailed: Failed to load leaderboard, please check server connection
groupEmpty: No players in this group yet

v3.title: 8-Metric Leaderboard
v3.eligibilityRule: Eligibility: each ability role (Assassin / Morgana / Mordred / Oberon / Percival / Merlin) >= 3 games AND Loyal Servant >= 15 games
v3.popAvgExplain: PopAvg (population mean) = community average across 2146 games per metric — used as the baseline to compare each player against.

tooltips.elo: ELO score: derived from win-rate + opponent strength + game-count reliability, on a community-wide unified scale.
tooltips.threeRed: 3-Red: when on the red side, share of games where Resistance won 3 missions in a row.
tooltips.threeBlueDead: 3B-Dead: when on the red side, share of games where the blue side completed 3 missions but Merlin was killed (red wins).
tooltips.threeBlueAlive: 3B-Alive: when on the blue side, share of games where blue completed 3 missions AND Merlin survived (blue wins).
tooltips.redWin: RedWin: overall win share when on the red side (= 3-Red + 3B-Dead).
tooltips.blueWin: BlueWin: overall win share when on the blue side (= 3-Blue-Alive).
tooltips.threeBlue: 3-Blue: when on the blue side, share of games where blue completed 3 missions (= 3B-Dead + 3B-Alive).
tooltips.missionWin: MissionWin: weighted share of games where this player's faction completed/succeeded the mission (Σ red 3-Red·P_red + Σ blue 3-Blue·P_blue).
tooltips.expectedWin: ExpectedWin: overall weighted win share across all roles (Σ red RedWin·P_red + Σ blue BlueWin·P_blue).
tooltips.precision: PrecisionWR: role × seat weighted win rate (Σ_role Σ_seat P_role·P_seat·WR), with cell-level Bayesian shrinkage α=5.

outcomeMode.allHint: All 12 columns shown, sorted by ExpectedWin
